title: 3 Order Block Mistakes Killing Your Funded Account (2026)
description: Stop losing on funded accounts. The R2F Trading system breaks down the 3 order block mistakes 90% of traders make — and how smart money actually moves. Follow r2ftrading.com for daily ICT setups.
script: I blew 3 funded accounts. Same mistake every time. I was trading order blocks wrong. Here are the 3 errors killing most traders right now. Mistake one. Marking ANY bearish candle as an order block. Wrong. A real order block is the LAST down candle before a strong bullish move. Miss this — you're just guessing. Mistake two. Entering the second price touches the order block. Smart money raids it first. Wait for the liquidity sweep BELOW the block. Then enter. That sweep is your confirmation. Mistake three. Ignoring the fair value gap above. 78% of valid order block trades close the FVG first. That gap IS your target. No FVG above? The setup is weak. Skip it. Fix all three. Watch your funded account survive. The R2F Trading system covers this every week. Follow R2F Trading. New setups daily at r2ftrading.com.
